title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard
New account is stored in the database with the provided email and hashed password

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account registration page
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with password shorter than 8 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password of 7 characters or less (e.g., Pass123)
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters is accepted
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard
New account is stored in the database with the provided email and hashed password

title: Concurrent registration attempts with the same email are handled securely
preconditions: No existing account with email 'concurrent@example.com' exists in the system
System is configured to handle concurrent requests
test_steps: Send 5 simultaneous registration requests with the same email 'concurrent@example.com' and valid passwords
Wait for all requests to complete
Check the database for accounts with email 'concurrent@example.com'
expected_results: Only one account is created with the email 'concurrent@example.com'
All other requests are rejected with an appropriate error message (e.g., 'Email already in use')
No duplicate accounts exist in the database
No race condition or data integrity issues occur

title: Account creation with empty password is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Leave the confirm password field empty
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with whitespace-only password is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password consisting only of spaces (e.g., '        ' - 8 spaces)
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with password containing leading/trailing spaces is accepted
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password with leading and trailing spaces that is at least 8 characters excluding spaces (e.g., '  Password123  ')
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard
New account is stored in the database with the provided email and hashed password

title: Account creation with empty email is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that email is required
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with duplicate email using different case is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account registration page
test_steps: Enter the email address 'EXISTING@EXAMPLE.COM' (same email but different case)
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')
No new account is created in the database

title: Account creation with duplicate email after successful registration is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account registration page
No existing account with the email to be used initially
test_steps: Enter a valid, unique email address (e.g., newuser@example.com)
Navigate back to the registration page
expected_results: First account creation is successful
Second account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')
No duplicate account is created in the database

title: Account creation with duplicate email using special characters (e.g., + alias) is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'test+alias@example.com' already exists in the system
User is on the account registration page
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')
No new account is created in the database
